creator: mab@red-bean.com
text:
On Wed, Dec 27, 2006 at 01:01:03PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/xwrits,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107236 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Sure.  (I don't use this port any more; if the committer wants to be
the new maintainer that's fine with me.)
